# terrible_community_general_memset_zone (Data Source)





<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `api_key` (String) The API key obtained from the Memset control panel.
- `host_id` (String) ID of the `terrible_host` to run this data source against
- `name` (String) The zone nickname; usually the same as the main domain. Ensure this value has at most 250 characters.
- `state` (String) Indicates desired state of resource.

### Optional

- `force` (Boolean) Forces deletion of a zone and all zone domains/zone records it contains.
- `ttl` (Number) The default TTL for all records created in the zone. This must be a valid int from https://www.memset.com/apidocs/methods_dns.html#dns.zone_create.

### Read-Only

- `memset_api` (String) Zone info from the Memset API.
